creator: cheunghonyu@gmail.com
text:
To compile netpbm with MANPAGES option result to checksum error.

The following is poudriere log

=======================<phase: checksum     >==========================
===>   netpbm-10.35.89 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
===> Fetching all distfiles required by netpbm-10.35.89 for building
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for netpbm-10.35.89.tgz.
=> No SHA256 checksum recorded for netpbm-manpages-2013-03-09.tgz.
=> No suitable checksum found for netpbm-manpages-2013-03-09.tgz.
*** [checksum] Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/graphics/netpbm.

Fix: 

add netpbm-manpages-2013-03-09.tgz checksum record in distinfo again
How-To-Repeat: To compile netpbm with MANPAGES option
